summary: Multi-agent planning poker: adversarial estimation with persona roles (pessimist, optimist, security, perf) plus human tiebreaker. Two-dimension estimation shape (story points + effort/complexity) was designed but not built.
Agent personas: typed roles (build.md, planning.md, retro.md, review.md, research.md) in .claude/agents/twisted/ with per-role CLAUDE.md rules. tx init generation discussed but not built.
tx commit wrapper: auto-format commit messages with epic/task refs, write hash back to tasks.json. Git hook generation via tx init. Design chosen (option C) but not implemented.
Ralph integration: use Ralph's session-respawning loop as build-step execution harness while twisted-workflow manages state/artifacts. Identified as complementary, deferred.
Daemon/concurrency: sock-daemon on-demand per-project server with idle timeout. File locking (proper-lockfile) as fallback. Architecture designed, not implemented.
Cross-epic dependencies: depends_on between epics. User explicitly punted — only artifact-level within-epic dependencies kept in scope.
Human-team features deferred: velocity/burndown tracking, sprint grouping/containers, generated .md board views, web UI, reporting formats. All explicitly marked don't-build-yet.
Remaining v3 deferrals: v2-to-v3 migration tooling, config editing via CLI (tx config set), findRoot upward traversal (skip), npm publish workflow / CI.
